final_answer: Acquiring extraordinary abilities often grants individuals the capacity to alter the world for the better, yet this gift frequently imposes a heavy load of responsibility. While the ability to save lives offers unparalleled impact, wielding such power without consideration for duty risks harm. Consequently, understanding the magnitude of responsibility is essential for anyone seeking to utilize these gifts ethically.<|im_end|>
